bead.title: implement: worker progress SSE endpoint and WorkerRecord schema update
bead.description: FEAT-002 req 24 requires GET /api/projects/:project/workers/:id/progress as a Server-Sent Events stream delivering FEAT-006 progress events (phase transitions + heartbeats). Current server only has /api/agent/workers/{id}/log (unscoped log buffer, no SSE). Additionally, the current WorkerRecord struct lacks the FEAT-002 specified current_attempt (with attempt_id, bead_id, bead_title, harness, model, profile, phase, phase_seq, started_at, elapsed_ms, tokens, cost_usd), recent_phases (capped at 20 phase-transition events), and last_attempt fields. The polling alternative (GET /api/projects/:project/workers/:id with recent_phases) must also be served.
bead.acceptance: GET /api/projects/:project/workers/:id/progress streams SSE events matching FEAT-006 progress event schema; WorkerRecord includes current_attempt and recent_phases; GET /api/projects/:project/workers/:id returns updated shape; Go unit tests cover event streaming and WorkerRecord shape; ddx-60c52ef3 (counter fix) can be closed as part of this work
